subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! They tell of Isfandiyár, who, though possessing a body of bronze, met his end from an arrow to the eye [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان گویند اسفندیار رواین تن بود ولی پایان از تیر پران چشم
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @stories; anecdotes, @composure; tranquillity; serenity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power of love
